narrative:
Cols 65-E (precinct in Franklin County) has 1,018 registered voters, with 53.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 25.7%, a modest Democratic lean of 4.9 percentage points.
